items.title: Tesla-SpaceX Merger Could Trigger Musk's $1T Pay Package Automatically
items.body: SpaceX has a big IPO coming up, but the next step might be a merger of SpaceX and Tesla. And if so, it could be a backdoor to triggering Elon Musk's trillion-dollar pay package automatically, without having to meet any o…
